title: Completion – 15th Installation Ceremony
description: The 15th Installation Ceremony was successfully conducted with distinguished guests and members.

title: First  1 Board Meeting Notice
description: The first Board Meeting will take place at 5pm in Seven Wonders Water Park & Resort, Pokhara-27, Talchowk.

title: Invitation for the General Meeting
description: The General Meeting of our new term will be held at Seven Wonders Water Park & Resort, Pokhara-27, Talchowk at 6pm.

title: Postpone of ZRR visit
link: Notice for Postpond of ZRR visit.pdf
description: The ZRR visit scheduled for this Saturday has been postponed due to the going Gen-Z protests and the current situation of the country. A new date will be announced soon.

title: Invitation for the General Assembly
link: Notice for Invitation for the General Assembly.pdf
description: The General Assembly for this term will be held at Seven Wonders Water Park & Resort, Pokhara-27, Talchowk at 4pm.
